title: Mob Lite
description: It allows you to modify the spawn limit and the spawn limit of each specific entity in real time using commands
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceaa395866c1c0f378e73f0bce0c55a036e24709.png)
**How it works**
The mod allows you to modify the global spawn limit, and additionally configure the spawn limit of each specific Minecraft entity in real time, without needing to close the launcher or restart the server.

**Available Categories**

ambient
axolotls
creature
misc
monster
underground_water_creature
water_ambient
water_creature

To modify the spawn limit of any category, use the following command:

/modify mobcap <category> <amount>

**Example:**

/modify mobcap Monster 270

**Specific Entity Limits**
To modify the spawn limit of a specific entity, use the following command:

/modify mob <entity> <amount>

**Example:**

/modify mob zombie 70

This allows you to adjust any entity in Minecraft precisely and accurately, giving you a wide variety of configuration options.

**Client and Server Usage**
• The mod can be used in both client and server mode.
• It also supports running on the server without requiring installation on the client.

**Development Status**
The mod will continue to be developed and updated whenever changes are necessary, including bug fixes or the addition of new mechanics.

**Community**
If you want to make suggestions, stay informed about future updates and changes, or report bugs and issues, join our Discord group.
https://discord.gg/7a5cN5PkBD
